name: Top Ramen Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles in boiling water for 3 minutes. Rinse with cold water and drain.
2. Heat oil in a wok or skillet. Stir-fry meat and onions for 1 minute.
3. Add the cooked noodles, seasonings from the flavor packet, and lemon juice to the pan. Toss everything together and heat through until evenly warm.
4. Serve topped with 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds. Garnish with lemon wedges.
